Hickam_Orientation: Addressed the comorbid challenges of AI homogenization (Ontological Flattening) and passive utility by formalizing a strategy where AI acts as a constraint engine to cultivate human epistemic clarity.
Contrastive_Delta: Shifted the architectural paradigm from 'AI as Oracle' to 'Inversion for Emergence,' establishing the Plausibility Oracle and Epistemic Escrow as core features to structure the Human-AI Semantic Parallax Zone.
